title: Automation QA Engineer
responsibilities: create and maintain test cases; automate regression and smoke checks; document defects and collaborate with engineering teams
requirements_text: We are looking for a junior specialist with hands-on experience in testing, jira, sql, postman, python. Strong communication and delivery ownership are expected.
benefits: Flexible schedule, paid vacation, learning budget, mentorship, and access to modern tooling.
summary: TalentGrid is hiring a junior automation qa engineer to support validating product quality through manual and automated testing.
raw_text: Vacancy V044: Automation QA Engineer at TalentGrid. Location: Dnipro. Employment: hybrid. Required experience: 1.3 years. Required skills: testing, jira, sql, postman, python, java, test automation. Optional skills: test planning, performance testing. Responsibilities: create and maintain test cases; automate regression and smoke checks; document defects and collaborate with engineering teams.
